rankings.title: When the Train Doesn't Come: The Property Value Destruction of HS2's Northern Cancellation
conditions: documenting the surprise/limited anticipation of the October 2023 announcement
separating station-access effects from corridor-blight effects
using spatially robust inference
repeat-sales or rich hedonic specifications

rankings.title: Speed Kills Less at 20mph: The Welsh Default Speed Limit and Road Casualties
